Everything you need,
in one place.
View all services

Home Healthcare
Care at your door.
Nurses, physiotherapists, and caregivers — visiting you at home when you need it most.
↗
Teleconsultation
A doctor in minutes.
UAE-licensed physicians available 24/7 by video, voice, or chat.
↗
Mental Wellness
Support, on your terms.
Therapists and psychologists available online. Confidential, judgment-free.
↗

Delivered in 2 hours.
Prescription and OTC medicines. Straight to your door, across the UAE.

Certified nutritionists, personalised plans built around your goals and lifestyle.

How It Works
Four steps to
better health.

No referrals. No waiting rooms. No paperwork. Just care, exactly when you need it.

01
Download the App
iOS and Android. Sign up in 2 minutes with your Emirates ID or passport.
02
Choose a Service
Consultation, pharmacy, home care, mental wellness, lab tests, and more.
03
Connect in Minutes
UAE-licensed doctors available in under 5 minutes, any hour of the day.
04
Receive Your Care
Prescriptions, treatment plans, medicine delivery — all in your TruDoc record.
Our Doctors
Licensed. Verified.
Ready now.

Every TruDoc physician is licensed by UAE health authorities, credentialed through our multi-stage verification process, and held to the highest clinical standards — delivered remotely.

✓
DHA and DOH licensed across all specialties
✓
Consultations in English, Arabic, Hindi & more
✓
Average response time under 4 minutes
✓
Full medical records kept securely in your app
